lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery. There are mechanical issues that require repair.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle in absolute mint condition! It looks and drives just like it did the day it was first sold, featuring a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that has been meticulously maintained. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car in showroom-quality condition!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, some paint fading on the hood, and a small dent on the rear bumper. The interior is generally clean but does show wear on the driver’s seat and some light staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car runs and drives, but it would benefit from a comprehensive service soon to address minor suspension noise and ensure long-term reliability. This is an honest car for someone looking for a budget-friendly option that is functional but not perfect.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition and offers a functional driving experience for those looking for a budget-friendly option. The exterior shows its age with some visible paint oxidation on the roof and hood, along with various scuffs and small dents around the body. Inside, the cabin exhibits moderate wear, particularly on the driver’s seat and high-touch surfaces like the steering wheel and gear shifter. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are operational, though the car would benefit from a comprehensive tune-up and potentially some suspension work to address minor rattles. It has been a dependable commuter, but please expect the typical signs of wear and tear associated with a car of this age and mileage.
Poor condition.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional balance of performance and sophisticated styling. This specimen has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic excellence. It stands as a testament to responsible ownership, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist seeking both reliability and prestige.

Hey there! I'm parting with my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs great and looks fantastic—you're going to love how it handles! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
Available is a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine,
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only.

This 2019 Audi A6 Premium Plus has been meticulously cared for and presents beautifully in Moonlight Blue Metallic. The exterior retains a deep luster, with only minor road peppering consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the Nougat Brown leather interior remains supple and clean, featuring the dual-screen MMI touch response system and a panoramic sunroof that floods the cabin with light. Mechanically, the vehicle is sound, having followed a strict maintenance schedule at authorized service centers. It drives smoothly with responsive handling and sure-footed Quattro all-wheel drive. Recent service includes a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection, confirming the brakes and tires have plenty of life remaining.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, meticulously maintained to ensure peak operational integrity. Exhibiting a standard of care that reflects its robust mechanical history, this model offers a sophisticated driving experience and enduring value. A premier selection for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and prestige.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle exemplifies consistent maintenance and reliable performance. Thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation, this offering represents an optimal balance of value and sophistication for the discerning driver.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been absolute gold. It’s in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for someone who wants a reliable car without the brand-new price tag. It’s been well-cared for and is ready for its next adventure with you. Come take it for a spin!
This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through its individual throttle
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Minimal cosmetic wear. Runs reliably. Clean title.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a beautiful shine, showing only minor, inevitable signs of road use that do nothing to detract from its overall presence. Step inside to find a pristine cabin where the upholstery remains supple and the dashboard is free of any cracks or fading. Every electronic feature, from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and strong, backed by a comprehensive service history that ensures total peace of mind for the next owner. It drives straight, brakes firmly, and offers a quiet, comfortable ride that feels substantial on the highway. This is a dependable, high-quality car that looks as good in a driveway as it feels on the open road.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and longevity. Meticulously maintained, it offers a refined driving experience and a sophisticated presence. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of proven performance and exceptional value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent care and mechanical integrity, it has undergone a comprehensive professional inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. An exceptional value that balances sophisticated engineering with proven durability.

Hey there! I'm parting with my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks and feels great on the road. It runs like a dream and is ready for its next big adventure with you! Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 represents a mechanically sound example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The 3.2L inline-six features a high-pressure VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band and a 7,900 RPM redline. Mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, the drivetrain provides an engaging, analog driving experience. Crucial preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rear subframe reinforcement and rod bearing service. The chassis retains its tactile feedback through a refined MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension setup. While exhibiting minor cosmetic wear consistent with an enthusiast-driven vehicle, its mechanical integrity and structural rigidity remain excellent for spirited use.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Minimal cosmetic wear. Clean title. Maintenance up to date.

This meticulously cared-for vehicle strikes the ideal balance between daily utility and refined style. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish that catches the light beautifully, showing only the slight, natural signs of road use expected of a well-loved car. Step inside to a spacious, pristine interior where the materials remain supple and every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the responsive infotainment system—operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine performs with consistent power and smooth acceleration, backed by a diligent service history that ensures long-term reliability. Equipped with tires showing excellent tread and a suspension that absorbs the road with ease, this car delivers a quiet, confident driving experience. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that is ready for the road today.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience and proven mechanical integrity. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, this model stands as a testament to diligent ownership and consistent care. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated balance of performance, safety, and long-term value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering an exceptional balance of refined performance and long-term mechanical integrity. Having undergone a rigorous professional assessment, the unit presents in commendable condition, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that exemplifies both value and quality craftsmanship.

Hi there! I'm selling my awesome car and it's looking for a new adventure! It's in really nice shape and has been super dependable for me. Whether you're cruising around town or headed on a trip, it's a total joy to drive. I've taken great care of it, so it's all ready for you to hop in and go. Feel free to reach out with

Used car in good condition. Runs well. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road nicks expected from careful driving. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather seats are supple and well-preserved, with minimal wear on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the high-fidelity sound system, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with all records available. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts with precision. It’s a reliable, eye-catching ride that has been kept in a climate-controlled garage. Ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any needed repairs.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and refined engineering. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of reliability and sophisticated aesthetics. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this unit stands as a testament to diligent ownership and enduring quality.
